{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Titan communication program
| introduced = The Knight
}}

== The Knight ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Titan communication program]] is designed to call other [[Titans]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c42">''The Knight'', chapter 42</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|“The Titan communication program is designed to call other Titans,” Mell explained.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c42" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
